content: Phase 4: Install resend package; update .env placeholders
Phase 4: Backend - currency support on users, invoices, quotations + currencies endpoint
Phase 4: Backend - CSV export endpoints for clients/invoices/quotations/projects
Phase 4: Backend - Recurring invoices CRUD + generate next + auto-run on access
Phase 4: Backend - Email send endpoint (Resend with graceful 'not configured' fallback)
Phase 4: Backend - Update PDF generator to be currency-aware
Phase 4: Frontend - Light/dark theme toggle with localStorage persistence
Phase 4: Frontend - Currency formatter + Settings currency selector + per-doc currency in editor
Phase 4: Frontend - CSV export buttons on each list page
Phase 4: Frontend - Recurring Invoices page + sidebar nav
Phase 4: Frontend - Send Email modal from invoice editor
